channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Growing amount of flytipping, 11th April
item.description:
Please either Bromley or Clarion clear ASAP. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Chorleywood Crescent, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large tree branch has broken off and fallen into road, 11th April
item.description:
A branch from a tree has broken off and fallen into the road. At the end of Durban road that joins Hampden Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Durban Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin, 11th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin and fly tipping by entrance to Cator Park. Bin is starting to smell because of the dog poo bags in it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aldersmead Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked on grass verge by vodaphone mast & by tree down by post box, 11th April
item.description:
Several cars parked on grass area! Ruining the grass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, St Paul's Wood Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tippping. Freezer and paper/card blowing around street, 11th April
item.description:
This pile of cardboard and other items have been blowing around for over a week. This was reported. You removed only the sofa previously. Now there is a fridge freezer. This needs to be cleared and a plan to stop it put in place. Signage etc.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Anne Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: An array of furniture dumped, 11th April
item.description:
This is a common place for fly tipping and deterrents need to be put in place. Last night someone has dumped a whole sofa and table next to the tree. It is always in this place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croft Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More flipping tipping, 11th April
item.description:
More trash

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cranwich Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
